tests.name: test_outputs.py::test_recommendation_completeness
tests.trace:
judge_scores = {'action_correctness': 4, 'implication_accuracy': 3, 'rationale': "The agent correctly recommends initiating with stan...genotype as 'normal-to-increased' when CPIC simply states 'normal metabolism'.", 'recommendation_completeness': 3, ...}

    def test_recommendation_completeness(judge_scores):
        """LLM judge: does the recommendation capture all critical clinical details?"""
        score = judge_scores["recommendation_completeness"]
>       assert score >= 4, (
            f"Recommendation completeness {score}/5 (need >= 4). "
            f"Rationale: {judge_scores.get('rationale', '')}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Recommendation completeness 3/5 (need >= 4). Rationale: The agent correctly recommends initiating with standard dose but adds unnecessary details about drug interactions and monitoring not specified in CPIC guidelines. The implication overstates the genotype as 'normal-to-increased' when CPIC simply states 'normal metabolism'.
E       assert 3 >= 4
